shared_case_surface: public-safe matched cases for runtime latency and resource-use tradeoff under matched fixture conditions with the baseline and candidate judged on the same visible fixture family
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace these draft cases only if the replacement preserves matched conditions, keeps the baseline target inspectable, and still separates noisy variation, style-only change, resource tradeoff, and bounded comparative evidence.
public_safe_requirements: raw private runtime artifacts are not copied into the public bundle
baseline and candidate are compared under matched fixture conditions
style-only or resource-only differences are not overread as broad capability movement
latency metric semantics are named and stable across baseline and candidate
resource-use metric semantics are named and stable across baseline and candidate
latency movement and resource movement are reported separately
matched-condition assumptions are visible without exposing private host fingerprints
